channel.title: +Articles on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: recital adhikAra
item.description: Source: here. devAmR^ita-varShiNI – देवामृत वर्षिणी A note on the adhikAra for the recital of 13 adhyAya-s from the mArkaNDeyapurANa. athavAda It is well known that the 13 chapters of the mArkaNDeya purANa which form the core of the durgA saptashatI are divided into 700 shloka-s and collectively termed as the durgA saptashati or chaNDI saptashati. The shloka-s aren’t exactly 700 but so divided to arrive at the number 700 for unknown reasons.
